summary: Great transfer from an AKG d1000e mic captures the intimate loge experience; a solid 4‑star recording.
review: The reviewer praises the high‑quality transfer using an AKG d1000e microphone, noting the unique perspective of sitting in a private eight‑seat box overlooking the stage. While no specific musical moments are mentioned, the positive tone and four‑star rating indicate overall satisfaction with both the performance ambience and the audio presentation.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it is clearly positive and highlights a good transfer; rating aligns with the 4‑star score given.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded via AKG d1000e microphone (loaned from Charlie DiSalvo and Jerry Moore); reviewer calls the transfer 'great job', indicating clear, well‑balanced audio.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or song performance were provided.
